prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 91.9 kg; Height 172.2 cm; BMI 31.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 245mg/dL; 9 months ago 209mg/dL; 6 months ago 228mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 186mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 91.2kg; 9 months ago 92.2kg; 6 months ago 90.9kg; 3 months ago 92.9kg; current 91.9kg), Height (12 months ago 172.2cm; 9 months ago 172.2cm; 6 months ago 172.2cm; 3 months ago 172.2cm; current 172.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 101U/L; 9 months ago 101U/L; 6 months ago 102U/L; 3 months ago 101U/L; current 93U/L), AST (12 months ago 81U/L; 9 months ago 82U/L; 6 months ago 81U/L; 3 months ago 82U/L; current 75U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.5mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 9.5mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 212mg/g; 9 months ago 302mg/g; 6 months ago 241mg/g; 3 months ago 389mg/g; current 342mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 152mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 145mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
